creator: royce@tycho.org
text:
The problem persists for multiple users, even after applying EN-14:04.kldxref.

https://www.mail-archive.com/freebsd-security@freebsd.org/msg05027.html
http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-questions/2014-May/258200.html

Both 9.2 and 8.4 are reported as affected.
